productInsights: Default enforcement mode changed guide→monitor (v2.10.x). New installs observe before enforcing — 'monitor first, enforce when ready' is the key adoption angle.
check-site-stats.sh now in scripts/ — wirable to CI for site/** PRs. Recommend adding to size-check.yml or dedicated site check workflow.
5 governed driver adapters: Claude Code, Codex CLI, Copilot CLI, Gemini CLI, Goose (MCP). Goose uses MCP protocol vs hook-based for the other four — different integration story.
OpenCode supported in identity system (OPENCODE_HOME detection) but not mentioned in site Supported Frameworks section — content gap, not factual error.
v2.10.3 is latest. Full arc: v2.9 wildcard fix → v2.10 default mode change → v2.10.3 cloud tenant fix. All available for #1260 announcement.
